title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 144.310 - Records kept by director
text:
144.310.  Records kept by director. — The director of revenue shall keep a record of every tax, interest, penalty, and security imposed, paid, or deposited under sections 144.010 to 144.510.
(RSMo 1939 § 11434, A.L. 1941 p. 698, A.L. 1943 p. 1012, A.L. 1945 p. 1865, A.L. 1983 1st Ex. Sess. H.B. 10) 
Effective 1-1-84
